title: NY Times Bestseller!!! | #shorts
full_text: Noa, why you crying? Why are you crying? We made it. We made it. New York Times bestseller list. Why are you like, can you Why did something happen? No. I'm just so happy. You can't fire me. Huh? No. Yeah, I can still fire you. I heard that. I can But not today. Not today. We made it. Two categories. Two categories. New. You drove the pre-order. I told you you could do it. Do you remember when I said you could do it? Do you remember now? You know you could do it. What are you crying about now? It's just it's crazy that it's real, you know? And it's it's crazy because we made it number 12 on the list. We weren't even high on the list. We were 12 out of 15. And like it's just a reminder that like every sale counted. Every single sale, every single person, every hustle you did, every grind, every review we got. Oh my god. Thank you. Can you say thank you to everybody who helped us? Thank you so much. And then tomorrow we will try something new to cry about. We will find Don't worry. I know you're stressed out about this. Bye. Bye.
